channel.title: Podcast on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Podcast on Pi Stack

item.title: Podgrab vs PodFetch vs Podsync: Best Self-Hosted Podcast Tools 2026
item.description: Podcast consumption has never been more popular, yet the tools to manage your podcast library remain scattered across proprietary apps and cloud services. If you want full control over your podcast downloads, storage, and feeds, self-hosted solutions give you exactly that — without subscriptions, tracking, or platform lock-in.
